en: On Monday, scientists from the Stanford University School of Medicine announced the invention of a new diagnostic tool that can sort cells by type: a tiny printable chip that can be manufactured using standard inkjet printers for possibly about one U.S. cent each.
gn: Upe Arakõipe, umi cientifico kuera Medicina Mbo'ehaopavẽ Stanford Mbo'eha guasu pegua omomarandu kuri peteĩ invento tembipuru puahu diagnosticorã ikatúva oiporavo umi celula kuera iñemohendarupive: peteĩ chip michimiva ikatuva ojehai kuatia ári impresora rupive ha ojehepyme'ẽ kuaáva 1 centavo pe dolar americanore.

en: Lead researchers say this may bring early detection of cancer, tuberculosis, HIV and malaria to patients in low-income countries, where the survival rates for illnesses such as breast cancer can be half those of richer countries.
gn: Umi investigador imarangatuveva he'i ko mba'e ikatuha otopa pe cancer oñepyrũjave, mba'asy po'i, VIH ha malaria umi tapicha hasyva oikova ambue tetã sa'i pirapire oguerekova, oimehape jeikove papaha cancer titiregua aimete omboku'a umi ambue tetã heta ipirapireva peguape.

en: The JAS 39C Gripen crashed onto a runway at around 9:30 am local time (0230 UTC) and exploded, closing the airport to commercial flights.
gn: Pe JAS 39C Gripen ojetopeta kuri upe avion pistape pyhareve 9:30 kuera rupi aravo localpe (0230 TUC) ha okapu, ha oñemboty pe aeropuerto umi vuelo ñemuha reguape.

en: The pilot was identified as Squadron Leader Dilokrit Pattavee.
gn: Pe piloto oñemopeteĩ kuri ha'eha Escuadron Mo'akãha Dolokrit Pattavee.

en: Local media reports an airport fire vehicle rolled over while responding.
gn: Umi kuatia ñe'ẽ local kuera omomarandu peteĩ mba'yru rendy oñetumbava ombohovai jave oikova aeropuertope.

en: 28-year-old Vidal had joined Barça three seasons ago, from Sevilla.
gn: Vidal, oguerekova 28 ary, oike kuri Barçape ojapoma mbohapy ara vore, Sevilla gui.

en: Since moving to the Catalan-capital, Vidal had played 49 games for the club.
gn: Ou rire ko Catalan tavaguasupe, Vidal ojuga kuri 49 partido ko clubpe.

en: The protest started around 11:00 local time (UTC+1) on Whitehall opposite the police-guarded entrance to Downing Street, the Prime Minister's official residence.
gn: Upe ñe'ẽnguru oñepyrũ kuri 11:00 kuera rupi aravo upepeguape (TUC+1) Whitewallpe, jeikeha guataha Downing renondepe oñatendeva tahachi kuera, upe Primer Ministro róga teete.

en: Just after 11:00, protesters blocked traffic on the northbound carriage in Whitehall.
gn: Upe 11:00 aravo riremi, umi ava kuera ñe'ẽnguruva ojoko mba'yru jehasa upe yvate gotyo jehoha Whitehallpe.

en: At 11:20, the police asked the protesters to move back on to the pavement, stating that they needed to balance the right to protest with the traffic building up.
gn: 11:20 aravope, tahachi kuera ojerure umi ava kuera ñe'ẽngurupe tojevy upe guataha rembere, omomarandu chupe kuera ha'ekuera ombojoja vaerãha upe iderecho kuera iñe'ẽnguru haguã upe mba'yru jehasa ndive.

en: Around 11:29, the protest moved up Whitehall, past Trafalgar Square, along the Strand, passing by Aldwych and up Kingsway towards Holborn where the Conservative Party were holding their Spring Forum in the Grand Connaught Rooms hotel.
gn: Ha 11:29 aravo kuera rupi, pe ñe'ẽnguru oho Whitehall yvate gotyo, ohasa Trafalgar Squarerupi, ohasa ohovo Aldwych ha Kingsway yvate gotyo, Holborn gotyo, Partido Conservador kuera ojapo haguepe Arapoty Ñemongeta guasu hina upe Grand Connaught Rooms hotelpe.

en: Nadal's head to head record against the Canadian is 7–2.
gn: Nadal akã ha akãre record Canada pegua here ha'e hina 7-2.

en: He recently lost against Raonic in the Brisbane Open.
gn: Ha'e operde ramoite kuri Raonic ndive upe Brisbane openpe.

en: Nadal bagged 88% net points in the match winning 76 points in the first serve.
gn: Nadal ombovosa kuri 88% umi punto netogui upe partidope ogana kuevo 76 punto upe servicio peteĩhape.

en: After the match, King of Clay said, "I am just excited about being back in the final rounds of the most important events. I am here to try to win this."
gn: Upe partido rire, upe Rey Yvy Ñay'ũ pegua he'i: "Che avy'aiterei aimejevy haguere ko ronda pahape ko evento iñimportantevevape. Ha che aime ape añeha'ã haguã aganavo pea".

en: "Panama Papers" is an umbrella term for roughly ten million documents from Panamanian law firm Mossack Fonseca, leaked to the press in spring 2016.
gn: "Panama Papers" ha'e hina peteĩ apy tuicha umi 10 sua rupi kuatia kuera upe Panama pegua firma tekopegua Mossack Fonseca, ombotyky vaekue marandurenda kuerape upe Arapoty 2016pe.

en: The documents showed fourteen banks helped wealthy clients hide billions of US dollars of wealth to avoid taxes and other regulations.
gn: Umi kuatia kuera ohechauka porundy banco oipytyvõ kuri icliente kuera iviruhetávape oñongatu haguã billones dólar americano pira pire ani haguã opaga impuesto tera ambue normativa kueragui.

en: British newspaper The Guardian suggested Deutsche Bank controlled roughly a third of the 1200 shell companies used to accomplish this.
gn: Kuatia ñe'ẽ Inglaterra pegua hérava The Guardian he'i Deutsche Bank ocontrolaha 1/3 rupi umi 1200 empresa gua'u kuera ojeipuruva ojepapo haguã ko mba'e.

en: There were protests worldwide, several criminal prosecutions, and the leaders of the governments of Iceland and Pakistan both resigned.
gn: Oiko ñe'ẽnguru opavave tetãme yvy apére, heta proceso criminal oĩkuri, ha umi mburuvicha Pakistán ha Islandia-gua mokõivéva o-renuncia-kuri.

en: Born in Hong Kong, Ma studied at New York University and Harvard Law School and once held an American permanent resident "green card".
gn: Heñói va'ekue Hong Kong-pe, Ma ojetavy'o kuri Mbo'ehaguasu Nueva York ha Facultad de Derecho Harvard-peguápe ha peteĩ jey oguereko va'ekue upe "green card" residencia permanente Estados Unidos pegua.

en: Hsieh implied during the election that Ma might flee the country during a time of crisis.
gn: Hsieh he'i kuri upe eleccion jave Ma ikatuha oheja hetã ko crisi aja.

en: Hsieh also argued that the photogenic Ma was more style than substance.
gn: Hsieh he'i avei upe Ma osẽ porãva ta'angape ha'e hague estilore ha ndaha'éi sustanciare.

en: Despite these accusations, Ma won handily on a platform advocating closer ties with the Chinese mainland.
gn: Jepe ambue mombe'u kuera rehe, Ma ogana hasy'ỹetere peteĩ plataformape omotenondeva joaju mbareteve China yvyguasu ndive.

en: Today's Player of the Day is Alex Ovechkin of the Washington Capitals.
gn: Ko arape Jugador Ko'ara pegua ha'e hina Alex Ovechkin, Washington Capitals pegua.

en: He had 2 goals and 2 assists in Washington's 5-3 win over the Atlanta Thrashers.
gn: Ha'e oguerekókuri 2 gol ha 2 asistencia upe Washington ñesẽ tenondépe 5-3 umi Atlanta Thrashers ári.

en: Ovechkin's first assist of the night was on the game-winning goal by rookie Nicklas Backstrom;
gn: Oveschkin asistencia peteĩha ko pyharepe ha'e kuri upe gol motenondeha partidope ojapo vaekue puahu Nicklas Backstrom;

en: his second goal of the night was his 60th of the season, becoming the first player to score 60 or more goals in a season since 1995-96, when Jaromir Jagr and Mario Lemieux each reached that milestone.
gn: ha igol mokõiha upe pyharépe ha'ékuri 60-ha upe ára vorépe, ha oiko chugui jugador peteĩha omoingéva 60 térã hetave gol peteĩ ára vorépe 1995-96 guive, uperõ Jaromir Jagr ha Mario Lemieux ambue ohupytýkuri ko tu'ã.

en: Batten was ranked 190th on the 2008 400 Richest Americans list with an estimated fortune of $2.3 billion.
gn: Batten ohupytýkuri 190° upe ary 2008 terarysýi 400 Americano Ipirapire hetavéva apytégui $2,3 su sua rupi.

en: He graduated from the College of Arts & Sciences of the University of Virginia in 1950 and was a significant donor to that institution.
gn: Ha'e ojerecivi kuri upe Facultad de Artes ha Cienciasgui, Mbo'ehaguasu Virginia peguagui ary 1950pe ha ha'e kuri peteĩ me'ẽreiha imarangatuva upe institucionpe.

en: Iraq's Abu Ghraib prison has been set alight during a riot.
gn: Ka'irãi Irak pegua Abu Ghraib oñemyendy kuri upe motin jave.

en: The jail became notorious after prisoner abuse was discovered there after US forces took over.
gn: Upe ka'irãi ojeikuaa porã kuri tapicha monambipyre kuera abuso ojetopa upepe umi milíko Americano cargope opyta rire.

en: Piquet Jr. crashed in the 2008 Singapore Grand Prix just after an early pit stop for Fernando Alonso, bringing out the safety car.
gn: Piquet Jr. ochoka kuri upe Grand Prix Singapur 2008pe, jepyta voi boxespe riremi Fernando Alonso ojapova, ha osẽ kuri upepe mba'yru segurida regua.

en: As the cars ahead of Alonso went in for fuel under the safety car, he moved up the pack to take victory.
gn: Ha umi mba'yru Alonso renondepegua oho aja omoĩ nafta upe mba'yru seguridad rapykuéri, ha'e oñemotenondékuri atýgui ha omohu'ã ñeha'ãha.

en: Piquet Jr. was sacked after the 2009 Hungarian Grand Prix.
gn: Piquet Jr. Oñemosẽ kuri upe Grand Prix Hungaria 2009 pegua rire.

en: At exactly 8:46 a.m. a hush fell across the city, marking the exact moment the first jet struck its target.
gn: Upe 8:46 javete pyhareve peteĩ kirirĩ ho'a upe tava tuichakue javeve, omarcavo upe momento exacto aviõ milíko ohupytyvo itemimo'ã peteĩha.

en: Two beams of light have been rigged up to point skywards overnight.
gn: Mokõi araveraichagua hendyva ojupy ára gotyo upe pyhare mbytepe.

en: Construction is ongoing for five new skyscrapers at the site, with a transportation center and memorial park in the middle.
gn: Jogapo ohorei hina hese oñemopu'ãvo po yvaga karãiha upe tendape, oguerekotava peteĩ centro mba'yru kuerape guara ha peteĩ yvyraty mandu'arã.

en: The PBS show has more than two-dozen Emmy awards, and its run is shorter only than Sesame Street and Mister Rogers' Neighborhood.
gn: Pe show PBS oguereko hina mokõi docena ari premios Emmy, ha oiko hague hina mbykymie Sesame Streetgui ha Mister Roger's Neighborhoodgui.

en: Each episode of the show would focus on a theme in a specific book and then explore that theme through multiple stories.
gn: Peteĩteĩ episodio ojesarekota hina peteĩ temare peteĩ kuatia ñe'ẽ rehegua ha upei omohesakã pe tema oipuruvo heta mombe'urã kuéra.

en: Each show would also provide recommendations for books that children should look for when they went to their library.
gn: Peteĩteĩ Show avei ome'ẽta hina recomendación mitã peguarã kuatiañe'ẽ ha'ekuéra oheka vaerã oho jave upe bibliotecape.

en: John Grant, from WNED Buffalo (Reading Rainbow's home station) said "Reading Rainbow taught kids why to read,... the love of reading — [the show] encouraged kids to pick up a book and to read."
gn: John Gran, pe WNED Buffalo pegua (Lectura de Arco Iris estación central) he'i kuri "Lectura de Arco Iris" ombo'e kuri mitã kuérape mba'erepa omoñe'ẽ vaerã kuatia ñe'ẽ… ohayhu haguã pe kuatia ñemoñe'ẽ (pe acción) omopy'aguasu umi mitã kuéra oguereko haguã peteĩ kuatia ñe'ẽ ha omoñe'ẽ haguã."

en: It is believed by some, including John Grant, that both the funding crunch and a shift in the philosophy of educational television programming contributed to ending the series.
gn: Ambue tapicha kuéra ocree hina, peape oike avei John Grant, he'i mokõiveva umi fondo kuéra ha pe jere oikova upe filosofia educacional pe programa  ta'anga mbyry pe ocontribui kuri opa haguã pe serie kuéra.

en: The storm, situated about 645 miles (1040 km) west of the Cape Verde islands, is likely to dissipate before threatening any land areas, forecasters say.
gn: Upe yvytupochy oimeva hina 645 millas (1040 km) kuarahy reike gotyo ypa'ũ kuera Cabo Verdegui, ha'ete ko opareitava hina omonkyhyje mboyve umi yvypehengue pegua kuerape, he'i upe pronostico ome'ẽva.

en: Fred currently has winds of 105 miles per hour (165 km/h) and is moving towards the northwest.
gn: Fred oguereko hina yvytu oipejuva 105 milla peteĩ aravope (165 km/h) ha oho hina upe yvate kuarahy reike gotyo.

en: Fred is the strongest tropical cyclone ever recorded so far south and east in the Atlantic since the advent of satellite imagery, and only the third major hurricane on record east of 35°W.
gn: Fred ha'e hina upe yvytu hatã imbareteveva ojeregistra va'ekue mombyry yvy gotyo ha kuarahy resẽ gotyo upe Atlantico-pe ojeipuru guive ta'ãnga satelite pegua ha yvytu hatã tuichava mbohapyha ojeregistráva upe 35° W kuarahy resẽ gotyo.

en: On September 24, 1759, Arthur Guinness signed a 9,000 year lease for the St James' Gate Brewery in Dublin, Ireland.
gn: 24 Jasyporundy 1759-pe, Arthur Guinness omboheraguapýkuri peteĩ alquiler 9.000 ary pukukue St. James's Gate Brewery g̃uarã, Dublin, Irlanda-pe.

en: 250 years later, Guinness has grown to a global business that turns over 10 billion euros (US$14.7 billion) every year.
gn: 250 ary rire, Guinness okakuaa oiko hag̃ua chugui peteĩ ñemuha yvytuichakue javeve omongu'éva 10 su sua euro (US$ 14,7 su sua) ary ñavõ.

en: Jonny Reid, co-driver for the A1GP New Zealand team, today made history by driving the fastest over the 48-year-old Auckland Harbour Bridge, New Zealand, legally.
gn: Jonny Reid, copiloto upe A1GP Nueva Zelanda equipo-pe, ko árape ojapo marandekohai omboguatávo mba'yru iñakuãvéva opavavégui upe Puente Auckland Harbour, Nueva Zelanda, ári oguerekóva 48 ary hekopeguaitépe.

en: Mr Reid managed to drive the New Zealand's A1GP car, Black Beauty at speeds over 160km/h seven times over the bridge.
gn: Karai Reid ikatu kuri omboguata imba'yru Nueva Zelanda A1GP pegua, Black Beauty, peteĩ akuãngue ohasava upe 160 km/h pokõi jehasa upe puente ari.

en: The New Zealand police had trouble using their speed radar guns to see how fast Mr Reid was going because of how low Black Beauty is, and the only time the police managed to clock Mr Reid was when he slowed down to 160km/h.
gn: Tahachi Nueva Zelanda pegua ijapañuãi kuri oipuru haguã upe imboka radar kuera oikuaa haguã mba'e hatãpa oho kuri Karai Reid ikarapere Black Beauty, ha umi tahachi ikatu ocronometra kuri peteĩha añoite Karai Reidpe ha'e kuri ha'e omboguejyvo imboguata 160 km/hpe.

en: In the last 3 months, over 80 arrestees were released from the Central Booking facility without being formally charged.
gn: Ko 3 jasy pahape, 80 ari oñemonambi vaekue ojepoi upe Central Booking instalaciongui oñemombe'u'yrẽ hekópe.

en: In April this year, a temporary restaining order was issued by Judge Glynn against the facility to enforce the release of those held more than 24 hours after their intake who did not receive a hearing by a court commissioner.
gn: Ko ary jasyrundýpe, Tekojojahára Glynn og̃uenohẽuka kuatia ipuku'ỹva he'íva oñemosãva'erãha tenda oñemosãso hag̃ua umi ojejokóva 24 aravo rire oikehaguéma oñemongeta'ỹre gueteri avave corte-gua ndive.

en: The commissioner sets bail, if granted, and formalizes the charges filed by the arresting officer. The charges are then entered into the state's computer system where the case is tracked.
gn: Upe comisionado omoĩ fianza, oñeme'ẽro, ha omoĩ hekópe pe mombe'u ojapo vaekue tahachi omonambi vaekue. Upe ñemombe'u upei oike upe estado computadora sistemape ha upepe ojetapykuereho pe caso.

en: The hearing also marks the date for the suspect’s right to a speedy trial.
gn: Audiencia omoarange avei upe oñembojaha derecho oguereko hag̃ua ñombohovake pya'erã.

en: Peter Costello, Australian treasurer and the man most likely to succeed Prime Minister John Howard as Liberal party leader has thrown his support behind a nuclear power industry in Australia.
gn: Peter Costello, Australia tesorero ha kuimba'e ikatúva hina omyengovia hina Primer Ministro John Howardpe upe partido Liberal tendota ome'ẽ mbojeko upe energia nuclear industria Australia peguape.

en: Mr Costello said that when nuclear power generation becomes economically viable, Australia should pursue its use.
gn: Karai Costello he'i kuri upe energia nuclear jejapo oikoha ara viable economicamente, Australia oheka vaerã oipuru haguã.

en: "If it becomes commercial, we should have it. That is, there's no in-principle objection to nuclear energy" Mr Costello said.
gn: "Oiko porã ramo comercialmente, ñande jaguerekomante vaerã. Upeva hina, ndaipori ñembotove ñepyrũpy hina energia nuclearpe", he'i kuri Karai Costello.

en: According to Ansa, "police were concerned by a couple of top-level hits they feared might spark a full-blown war of succession.
gn: Ansa momarandu rupive "tahachi kuera ojepy'apy hina upe mokõi pete mbarete oiko vaekue ha upeva ikatu omoñepyrũ hina peteĩ ñorairõ tuichapajepeva ojeikuaa haguã mavapa opytata tekoviara.

en: Police said Lo Piccolo had the upper hand because he had been Provenzano's right-hand man in Palermo and his greater experience won him the respect of the older generation of bosses as they pursued Provenzano's policy of keeping as low as possible while strengthening their power network.
gn: Tahachikuéra he'íkuri Lo Piccolo oguereko changui ha'égui Provenzano jehecharamove Palermo-pe ha upe hembiasakue arandu tuichavéva opoyhu umi mburuvicha tujavéva, ha'ekuéra oheka Provenzano política ojeguerekóvo karapete, ha upe jave omombaretevévo ipokatu.

en: These bosses had been reined in by Provenzano when he put an end to the Riina-driven war against the state that claimed the lives of Mafia crusaders Giovanni Falcone and Paolo Borsellino in 1992."
gn: Ko'ã mburuvicha ojejopýkuri Provenzano-re ombopaharõ guare upe Riina ñorãirõ tetãete rovake oguerahava'ekue umi Mafia joasa rekove Giovanni Falcone ha Paolo Borsellino 1992-me".

en: Apple CEO Steve Jobs unveiled the device by walking onto the stage and taking the iPhone out of his jeans pocket.
gn: Apple mburuvicha Steve Jobs ohechauka kuri upe dispositivo oguatahavo upe noha'agahape ha oguenohẽvo  upe iPhone ivaquero bolsillogui.

en: During his 2 hour speech he stated that "Today Apple is going to reinvent the phone, We are going to make history today".
gn: Upe mokõi aravo oñe'ẽ aja, ha'e he'íkuri: "Ko árape Apple ombopyahujeýta ñe'ẽmbyry, ore rojapóta marandekohai ko árape".

en: Brazil is the largest Roman Catholic country on Earth, and the Roman Catholic Church has consistently opposed the legalization of same-sex marriage in the country.
gn: Brasil ha'e hina upe tetã hetave oguerekova Catolico Romano ko yvy ari, ha upe Tupao Catolico Romano hatã oñemoĩ kuri omoañeteguaseva upe ñemenda meña ojeheguava rehe upe tetãme.

en: The National Congress of Brazil has debated legalization for 10 years, and such civil marriages are currently only legal in Rio Grande do Sul.
gn: Upe Congreso Tetãgua Brasil pegua odebati kuri ko ñemoañeteguaseva 10 ary kuerama, ha upeichagua ñemenda hi'añete hina Rio Grande do Sul añoitepe.

en: The original bill was drafted by former mayor of São Paulo, Marta Suplicy. The proposed legislation, after being amended, is now in the hands of Roberto Jefferson.
gn: Upe proyecto leiregua ohai vaekue Tendota kue São Paulo pegua Marta Suplicy. Upe legislacion ojejerure vaekue oje modificarire, oime ko'agã Roberto Jefferson pope.

en: Protesters hope to collect a petition of 1.2 million signatures to present to the National Congress in November.
gn: Ava ñe'ẽnguru kuera oha'arõ hina ombyaty peteĩ jerurera 1,2 sua teraguapy kuera ogueraha haguã upe Congreso Tetãme Jasypateĩpe.

en: After it became apparent that many families were seeking legal help to fight the evictions, a meeting was held on March 20 at the East Bay Community Law Center for the victims of the housing scam.
gn: Hesakã rire heta oguayguakuéra ohekahague pytyvõ añetéva oñorãirõ hag̃ua óga ñemosẽgui, peteĩ ñemongeta ojejapókuri 20 jasyapýpe upe Bahía Este Centro Legislación Comunitaria-pe umi porombotavy víctima-kuérape g̃uarã.

en: When the tenants started sharing what had occurred to them, most of the families involved suddenly realized that Carolyn Wilson of the OHA had stolen their security deposits, and skipped out of town.
gn: Umi locatario kuera oñepyrũro guare oikuaauka mba'epa oiko kuri hese kuera, aimete opavave ogaygua kuera oimevaekue involucrado upepe opilla Carolyn Wilson, OHA pegua, omonda ra'e isegurida deposito kuera, ha oho ra'e pe távagui.

en: Tenants at Lockwood Gardens believe that there may be another 40 families or more to face eviction, since they learned that OHA police are also investigating other public housing properties in Oakland that may be caught up in the housing scam.
gn: Umi locatario kuera Lockwood Gardens pegua orovia oimeneha ambue 40 ogaygua kuera tera hetave oñemosẽtava hogagui hina, oikuaavo ha'ekuera upe OHA politica ojetypeka avei hina ambue oga social kuera  Oaklandpe ikatu vaeke ojepilla upe oga ñembotavype.

en: The band canceled the show at Maui's War Memorial Stadium, which was set to be attended by 9,000 people, and apologized to fans.
gn: Pe musico kuera ombopaha kuri ñembopu upe Estado Maui War Memorialpe, oñembo sako'i vaekue oike haguã 9.000 ava kuera, ha omoñerõ umi fans kuerape.

en: The band's management company, HK Management Inc., gave no initial reason when they canceled on September 20, but blamed logistical reasons by the next day.
gn: Upe músico rendota mba'apoha, HK Management Inc., nome'ẽi ñepyrũra mba'érepa ombopaha 20 Jasyporundypegua, ombojákuri ñemongu'e rehe upe ambue árape.

en: The famous Greek lawyers, Sakis Kechagioglou and George Nikolakopoulos have been imprisoned in the Athens' jail of Korydallus, as they were found guilty of graft and corruption.
gn: Umi mo'ãhára kuera Griego ojeikuaa porãva, Sakis Kechagioglou ha George Nikolakopoulos, oñemondo kuri ka'i raĩpe upe carcel Korydallus Atenas peguape, ojetopa haguere culpable soborno ha corrupcionre.

en: As a result of this, a big scandal within the Greek legal community has been raised through the exposure of illegal actions that judges, lawyers, solicitors and attorneys have done during the previous years.
gn: Ha peva rupive, peteĩ sarambi tuichava tekoha hekopegua Griego apytepe oiko kuri ojechaukavo mba'epao hekopegua'ỹva, mo'ãhára kuera, fiscal kuera, defensor kuera ojapo vaekue hina umi ary kuera mboyvepe.

en: A few weeks ago, after the information published by the journalist Makis Triantafylopoulos in his popular Television show "Zoungla" in Alpha TV, the member of Parliament and lawyer, Petros Mantouvalos was abdicated as members of his office had been involved in illegal graft and corruption.
gn: Sa'i arapokõindy ohasa vaekue, ojekuaauka vaekue kuatiahaihára Makis Triantafylopoulos upe ta'angambyry showpe ojekuaá porãva "Zoungla" Alpha Tvpe, upe parlamentario ha mo'ãhára, Petros Mantouvalos oñemboyke kuri, ava kuera ikotymba'apoha pegua ojapo hekopegua'ỹva soborno ha corrupcion.

en: Moreover, top judge Evangelos Kalousis is imprisoned as he found guilty of corruption and degenerate behaviour.
gn: Jepe, juez tuichaiteveva, Evangelos Kalousis, oho ka'iraĩpe ojetopare culpable corrupcionre ha tekovaire.

en: Roberts flatly refused to say about when he believes life begins, an important question when considering the ethics of abortion, saying that it would be unethical to comment on the specifics of likely cases.
gn: Roberts ombotovete voi he'i hag̃ua ha'e oroviava mba'e momentopepa upe tekove oñepyrũ, peteĩ ñeporandu guasu ojeñe'ẽro upe etica membykua reheguare, ha he'i kuri ndaha'emo'ái etico oñe'ẽro mobosa'i kuerare umi káso ndaha'éva añetegua.

en: He did, however, reiterate his earlier statement that Roe v. Wade was the "settled law of the land", emphasizing the importance of consistent Supreme Court rulings.
gn: Upéicharõ jepe, ha'e ombojo'a he'iva'ekue, Roe vs. Wade ha'eha "yvy léi oñemohendáva", ohechaukavévo mba'eichaitépa oñemomba'eguasuva'erã Tekojojaro Rusu apopyrã ijojáva.

en: He also confirmed that he believed in the implied right to privacy which the Roe decision depended upon.
gn: Avei omoañete ogueroviahákuri tekokatu oje'e'ỹva ha'éva ñemi rehegua, Roe ñe'ẽpaha osãingóvare.

en: Maroochydore had finished on top of the ladder, six points clear of Noosa in second.
gn: Maroochydore og̃uahẽkuri jupiha ru'ãitéme, poteĩ kytareko Noosa renondépe mokõiháme.

en: The two sides would meet in the major semi final where Noosa ran out winners by 11 points.
gn: Mokõivéva oñembohovakéta ñemohu'ã mboyve tuichávape, Noosa oñemotenondehápe 11 kytareko rupive.

en: Maroochydore then defeated Caboolture in the Preliminary Final.
gn: Uperire Maroochydore ohejákuri Caboolture-pe tapykuépe Ñemohu'ã Tenondeguápe.

en: Hesperonychus elizabethae is a species of the family Dromaeosauridae and is a cousin of Velociraptor .
gn: Hesperonychus elizabethae ha'e peteĩ especie ha'éva Dromaeosauridae ogaygua rehegua ha Velociraptor pehẽngue.

en: This fully feathered, warm blooded bird of prey was believed to have walked upright on two legs with claws like the Velociraptor.
gn: Oñeimo'ãva'ekue ko guyra omoperõva, huguy akúva ha haguepaitéva oguataha mokõi kupy ipyapẽmbukúva ári, Velociraptor-cha.

en: Its second claw was larger, giving rise to the name Hesperonychus which means "western claw."
gn: Ipyapẽmbuku mokõiha tuichavéraka'e, upévare ojehero Hesperonychus, he'iséva "pyapẽmbuku kuarahy reike gotyogua".

en: In addition to the crushing ice, extreme weather conditions have been hampering rescue efforts.
gn: Yrypy'a omyangekóiva ári, arapytu ivaietereíva ohapejokókuri pysyrõ ñepia'ã.

en: Pittman suggested that conditions wouldn't improve until sometime next week.
gn: Pittman he'íkuri arapytu naiporãmo'ãiha ambue arapokõindy meve.

en: The amount and thickness of the pack ice, according to Pittman, is the worst it has been for sealers in the past 15 years.
gn: Pittman he'iháicha, yrypy'a retakue ha anambusukue ha'e mba'e ivaivéva umi foca omymbajukávape g̃uarã 15 ary ohasávape.

en: News spread in the Red Lake community today as funerals for Jeff Weise and three of the nine victims were held that another student was arrested in connection with the school shootings of March 21.
gn: Pe marandu omosarambi hina ape comunidad Red Lake pe ko árape Jeff Weise funeral pe ha ambue mbohapy victima porundy apytegui ojedetene ha ambue estudiante ojearresta avei pe mbo'ehao ñembokapu reheguare oiko vaekue 21 Jasyapype.

en: Authorities said little officially beyond confirming today's arrest.
gn: Autoridad kuéra nde'iri mba'eve oconfirma rire pe arresto ko ara pegua.

en: However, a source with knowledge of the investigation told the Minneapolis Star-Tribune that it was Louis Jourdain, 16-year old son of Red Lake Tribal Chairman Floyd Jourdain.
gn: Jepe, peteĩ fuente oikuaava ko jetypeka rehegua he'i kuri Mineapolis Star-Tribune pe ha'e hague Louis Jourdain, oguereko 16 ary, ha ha'e Floyd Jourdain ra'y, upeva Mburuvicha pe Tribu Red Lake pegua.

en: It is not known at this time what charges will be laid or what led authorities to the boy but juvenile proceedings have begun in federal court.
gn: Ndojeikuaai gueteri hina mba'e cargo pe oñemoita terã mba'epa ogueraha ra'e umi autoridad pe mitãkuimba'epe, jepe pe procedimiento menor pegua oñepyrũ kuri pe corte federal pe.

en: Lodin also said officials decided to cancel the runoff in order to save Afghans the expense and security risk of another election.
gn: Lodin avei he'i umi tembiguái ohapejokoha jeporavo jevy ani hag̃ua umi Afganistán-gua oipuru iviru ha omboyke hag̃ua ñemongyhyje oguerúva ambue jeporavo.

en: Diplomats said that they had found enough ambiguity in the Afghan constitution to determine the runoff as unnecessary.
gn: Umi oñe'ẽkuaáva he'íkuri otopaha Afganistán kuatiaguasu imba'eavyha he'i hag̃ua jeporavo jevy noñeikotevẽiha.

en: This contradicts earlier reports, which said that cancelling the runoff would have been against the constitution.
gn: Kóva ombohovake marãndu tenondegua, he'íva kuri jeporavo jevy jehapejoko oñembotoveha tetã kuatiaguasúpe.

en: The aircraft had been headed to Irkutsk and was being operated by interior troops.
gn: Pepo'atã oho'aínakuri Irkutsk gotyo ha milíko tetãpygua omoakã upéva.

en: An inquiry was established to investigate.
gn: Oñemohenda peteĩ ñeporandu oñemboguyguy hag̃ua.

en: The Il-76 has been a major component of both the Russian and Soviet military since the 1970s, and had already seen a serious accident in Russia last month.
gn: Upe Il-76 ha'eva'ekue mba'e Rusia ha Soviético milíko atygua oñemomba'eguasúva 1970 pa'arajere guive, ha oikomavoíkuri hese mba'e'aindýi Rusia-pe jasy ohasávape.

en: On October 7 an engine separated on takeoff, without injuries. Russia briefly grounded Il-76s after that accident.
gn: Upe 7 jasypápe, peteĩ moingoha oñemboja'ókuri itĩpu'ãnguévo, ai'ỹre. Rusia omboyvyguejy sapy'aite umi Il-76 upe mba'e'andýi rire.

en: 800 miles of the Trans-Alaska Pipeline System were closed down following a spill of thousands of barrels of crude oil south of Fairbanks, Alaska.
gn: Trans-Alaska Ñandyryrape Jeporavorape oñembotýkuri 800 milla pukukue oñehẽ rire heta su itakyra pýra mba'yruyvyrágui Fairbanks, Alaska yvy gotyope.

en: A power failure following a routine fire-command system test caused relief valves to open and crude oil overflowed near the Fort Greely pump station 9.
gn: Peteĩ ñanirýi apañuãi rupi, mba'era'ã jepiguáva rire tatarendy jeporavorape rehegua, umi mbohasaha ojeipe'a ha itakyra pýra oñehẽ Fort Greely mba'enohẽha pytaha 9-me.

en: The valves opening allowed a pressure release for the system and oil flowed on a pad to a tank that can hold 55,000 barrels (2.3 million gallons).
gn: Válvula jeipe'a rupive osẽ presión sistema-pe g̃uarã ha pe aceite osyry peteĩalmohadilla-gui peteĩ tanque ikatúva oguereko 55.000 barríl  (2,3 millones de galones).

en: As of Wednesday afternoon, the tank vents were still leaking probably from thermal expansion inside the tank.
gn: Ararundy ka'arúpe, yryrurãguasu pytuho rupi oñehẽ gueteri, oĩméne takukue omyasãihaguére yryrurãguasu ryepýpe.

en: Another secondary containment area below the tanks capable of holding 104,500 barrels was not yet filled to capacity.
gn: Ambue jejokoha renda yryrurãguýpe ikatúva ojoko 104.500 mba'yruyvyra nahenyhẽi gueteri ikatuha peve.

en: The comments, live on television, were the first time that senior Iranian sources have admitted that the sanctions are having any effect.
gn: Umi temiandu, ta'ãngambyrýme osẽva, ha'e peteĩha jevy umi Irán-gua apohare oñemomba'eguasúva he'iha umi ñembohepy ohejaha tapykuere.

en: They include financial restrictions and a ban by the European Union on the export of crude oil, from which the Iranian economy receives 80% of its foreign income.
gn: Umívape oike viru jejoko ha Joaju Europa-gua ñembotove itakyra pýra ojeguerahauka hag̃ua, upévagui Irán-gua virupurukuaa og̃uenohẽ 80% iviru ambue tetãgua.

en: In its most recent monthly report, OPEC said exports of crude had fallen to their lowest level for two decades at 2.8 million barrels per day.
gn: Imarãndu pyahuvévape osẽva jasýpe, Tetãnguéra Itakyra Oguerahaukáva Mohendapyrape he'i itakyra pýra guerahauka oguejypaiteha mokõi pa'arajerépe 2,8 sua mba'yruyvyrápe ára ha árape.

en: The country's supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, has described the dependency on oil as "a trap" dating from before Iran's Islamic revolution in 1979 and from which the country should free itself.
gn: Tendota rusu upe tetãgua, Ayatolá Ali Khamenei, he'i itakyráre ñesãingo ha'eha "peteĩ ñuhã" oñepyrũ va'ekue Irángua Islámico ñepu'ã mboyve 1979-me ha pe tetã isãsoha va'erã upévagui.

en: When the capsule gets to Earth and enters the atmosphere, at about 5am (eastern time), it is expected to put on quite a light show for folks in Northern California, Oregon, Nevada, and Utah.
gn: Pe kamambu'i og̃uahẽvove Yvýpe ha oikevove araguýpe, 5 aravo pyhareve rupi (aravo kuarahy resẽ gotyogua), oñeha'ãrõ oiko tendy hechaukapy umi tapichápe g̃uarã oikóva California yvate gotyo, Oregón, Nevada ha Utah-pe.

en: The capsule will look much like a shooting star going across the sky.
gn: Pe kamambu'i ojoguáta mbyja pya'e omýivape ohasáva yvágare.

en: The capsule will be traveling at about 12.8 km or 8 miles per second, fast enough to go from San Francisco to Los Angeles in one minute.
gn: Pe kamambu'i omýita 12,8 kilómetro térã 8 milla aravo'ivére, ipya'e ojehoháicha San Francisco guive Los Ángeles peve peteĩ aravo'ípe.

en: Stardust will set a new all-time record for being the fastest spacecraft to return to Earth, breaking the previous record set in May of 1969 during the return of the Apollo X command module.
gn: Stardust oñemohendáta record pyahúicha opa árape ha'ehaguére ygarata ipya'evéva og̃uahẽjevy hag̃ua Yvyýpe, ohasávo record oñemohendava'ekuépe jasypo 1969-me og̃uahẽjevývo Apollo X mba'yruveve'i.

en: “It will move over the west coast of northern California and will light the sky from California through central Oregon and on through Nevada and Idaho and into Utah,” Tom Duxbury, Stardust's project manager said.
gn: "Omýita y rembe'y kuarahy reike gotyogua ári California yvate gotyoguápe ha omyendýta yvága California guive Oregón mbyte rupi ha upéi Nevada ha Idaho rupi Utah peve", he'i Tom Duxbury, Stardust tembiaporã omoakãva.

en: Mr. Rudd's decision to sign the Kyoto climate accord isolates the United States, which will now be the only developed nation not to ratify the agreement.
gn: Karai Rudd omboheraguapývo Kioto arapytu ñe'ẽme'ẽ oheja ha'eño Estados Unidos-pe, ha'étava ko'ág̃a ha'eñoite tetã kakuaa nomoneĩriva pe ñe'ẽme'ẽ.

en: Australia's former conservative government refused to ratify Kyoto, saying it would damage the economy with its heavy reliance on coal exports, while countries like India and China were not bound by emissions targets.
gn: Sãmbyhyha noñemoambueséiva Australia-gua nomoneĩri Kioto he'ívo upéva ombyaineha ivirupurukuaa osãingo'atãgui umi tatapỹirã guerahaukáre, ha tetãnguéra ha'eháicha India ha China katu noĩri ñemyasãi jehupytyrã poguýpe.

en: It is the biggest acquisition in eBay's history.
gn: Upéva ha'e tuichave mba'e ojoguáva eBay hembiasakuépe.

en: The company hopes to diversify its profit sources and gain popularity in areas where Skype holds a strong position, such as China, Eastern Europe, and Brazil.
gn: Hi'ãnte pe atyvetépe oguerekove ambue viru ome'ẽva ha oipotave terakuã umi tenda Skype imbaretehápe, ha'eháicha China, Europa kuarahy resẽ gotyogua ha Brasil.

en: Scientists have suspected Enceladus as geologically active and a possible source of Saturn's icy E ring.
gn: Umi kuaapyhára oimo'ã Encélado yvyreko omyiha ha ikatuha upévagui osẽ Saturno kuãirũ E hypy'apýva.

en: Enceladus is the most reflective object in the solar system, reflecting about 90 percent of the sunlight that hits it.
gn: Encélado ha'e mba'e omimbivéva Kuarahy jeporavorapépe, omondojevývo 90 porciento rupi kuarahy rendy ombetíva hese.

en: The game publisher Konami stated today in a Japanese newspaper that they will not be releasing the game Six Days in Fallujah.
gn: Pe ñembosarái g̃uenohẽhára, Konami, he'i ko árape peteĩ kuatiahaipyre Japón-guápe nog̃uenohẽmo'ãiha ñembosarái Poteĩ Ára Faluya-pe.

en: The game is based on the Second Battle of Fallujah, a vicious battle between American and Iraqi forces.
gn: Pe ñembosarái ha'e Faluya Ñorãirõ Mokõiha rehegua, Estados Unidos ha Irak-gua milíko ñorãirõ ñarõ.

en: The ACMA also found that despite the video being streamed on the Internet, Big Brother had not breached online content censorship laws as the media had not been stored on Big Brother's website.
gn: Australia-gua Ñe'ẽmyasãi ha Ñemomarãndu Mburuvicha avei otopa pe ta'ãngamýi osẽrõ jepe Internet-pe, Big Brother nombohovakéi léi ñemokirirĩ rehegua ha'éva ojehupíva online rehegua, umi oñemomarãndúva noñeñongatuihaguére Big Brother web rendápe.

en: The Broadcasting Services Act provides for the regulation of Internet content, however to be considered Internet content, it must physically reside on a server.
gn: Léi Mosarambiha Pytyvõ rehegua ohechauka ñemohenda ha'éva Internet-pe ojehupíva rehegua, ha katu, ha'e hag̃ua Internet-pe ojehupíva, oĩmanteva'erã teterehe peteĩ servidor-pe.

en: The United States embassy located in Nairobi, Kenya has issued a warning that "extremists from Somalia" are planning to launch suicide bomb attacks in Kenya and Ethiopia.
gn: Estados Unidos tetãreraguarenda oĩva Nairobi, Kenia-pe, omomarãndu "churuchuchu apoha Somalia-gua" omondoseha jejukarã mbokapurã rupi Kenia ha Etiopía-pe.

en: The U.S. says it has received information from an undisclosed source that specifically mentions the use of suicide bombers to will blow up "prominent landmarks" in Ethiopia and Kenya.
gn: Estados Unidos he'i oguerekoha marãndu ijapoharekuaa'ỹva he'iporãva ojejukáva mbokapurã rupi ombokaputaha "tenda oñemomba'eguasúva" Etiopía ha Kenia-pe.

en: Long before The Daily Show and The Colbert Report, Heck and Johnson envisioned a publication that would parody the news—and news reporting—when they were students at UW in 1988.
gn: Are The Daily Show ha The Colbert Report mboyve, Heck ha Johnson oimo'ãreiva'ekue peteĩ ñemombe'uchauka oha'ãva pukarã momarãnduha —ha marãndu ñeporandusyry— ha'ekuéra ha'érõ guare temimbo'e Washington Mbo'ehaoguasúpe 1988-pe.

en: Since its inception, The Onion has become a veritable news parody empire, with a print edition, a website that drew 5,000,000 unique visitors in the month of October, personal ads, a 24 hour news network, podcasts, and a recently launched world atlas called Our Dumb World.
gn: Oñepyrũ guive, The Onion-gui oiko momarãndu ñeha'ã pukarã tuicha añetéva, oguerekóva kuatia ñenohẽ, peteĩ web renda oguerekóva 5.000.000 puruhára jasypápe, ñekuave'ẽ tee, peteĩ momarãndu ñembojoapy 24 aravo pukukue, podcast ha peteĩ yvy'ãngakuatia arapygua osẽramoitéva hérava Ñande Arapy Tavy.

en: Al Gore and General Tommy Franks casually rattle off their favorite headlines (Gore's was when The Onion reported he and Tipper were having the best sex of their lives after his 2000 Electoral College defeat).
gn: Al Gore ha general Tommy Franks omoñe'ẽ sapy'a ñe'ẽ ñepyrũrã oikũmbyvéva (Gore mba'éva ha'e The Onion omomarãndúrõ guare ha'e ha Tipper oporenoporãvehague hekópe opyta rire tapykuépe 2000-pe Aranduróga Jeporavoguápe).

en: Many of their writers have gone on to wield great influence on Jon Stewart and Stephen Colbert's news parody shows.
gn: Heta ihaihára tuicha oheja ipypore Jon Stewart ha Stephen Colbert momarãndu ñeha'ã pukarã hechaukapýpe.

en: The artistic event is also part of a campaign by the Bucharest City Hall that seeks to relaunch the image of the Romanian capital as a creative and colourful metropolis.
gn: Mba'eporã'apogua oikótava ha'e avei peteĩ aporã omoakãva Bucarest Tavaróga, oñeha'ãva og̃uenohẽjevy Rumania tavusu ra'ãnga peteĩ tava guasu ijejapo pyahu ha isa'y hetávaicha.

en: The city will be the first in southeastern Europe to host CowParade, the world's largest public art event, between June and August this year.
gn: Pe táva ha'éta peteĩha Europa yvy ha kuarahy resẽ gotyoguápe oguerekótava CowParade, tuichavéva mba'eporã'apo avaetagua oikótava arapýpe, jasypoteĩ ha jasypoapy ryepýpe ko arýpe.

en: Today's announcement also extended the government's commitment made in March of this year to fund extra carriages.
gn: Marãndu ko aragua avei ombotuichave sãmbyhyha ñe'ẽme'ẽ ojejapova'ekue jasyapýpe ko arýpe oñehepyme'ẽ hag̃ua ambueve mba'yru.

en: An additional 300 brings the total to 1,300 carriages to be acquired to relieve overcrowding.
gn: Ambueve 300 ohupi 1.300-pe mba'yru retakue oñehepyme'ẽtava ojoramie hag̃ua ojo'aripa ñeime.

en: Christopher Garcia, a spokesperson of the Los Angeles Police Department, said the suspected male offender is being investigated for trespassing rather than vandalism.
gn: Christopher Garcia, oñe'ẽva Tahachi Myakãha Los Ángeles-gua rérape, he'i pe kuimba'e oñeimo'ãva ojapoha pe mba'evai ojeheka óga sururúre, mba'e ñembyai rãngue.

en: The sign was not physically damaged; the modification was done using black tarpaulins decorated with signs of peace and heart to alter the "O" to read lowercase "e".
gn: Pe haihechaukaha noñembyaíri teterehe; ñemoambue ojejapo ojeipurúvo ao anambusu hũ oñembojeguáva py'aguapy ha ñe'ã ra'ãnga ndive oñemoambue hag̃ua pe "O" oñemoñe'ẽ hag̃ua "e" michĩvéva rupi.

en: Red tide is caused by a higher than normal concentration of Karenia brevis, a naturally-occurring single-celled marine organism.
gn: Y apeno pytã oiko Karenia brevis oñembyatyvove jepigua'ỹicha, upéva peteĩ hekovéva paragua peteĩ célula añónte oguerekóva, oikóva tekoha rupi.

en: Natural factors can intersect to produce ideal conditions, allowing this algae to increase in number dramatically.
gn: Tekohapegua mba'e ikatu ojuasa omoñepyrũ hag̃ua teko iporãva, ohejávo ko ygáu hetave ohóvo pya'eterei.

en: The algae produces a neurotoxin that can disable nerves in both humans and fish.
gn: Ygau oguereko peteĩ mba'e tajygue oporombohasýva ikatúva omonge tajygue yvypóra ha pirápe.

en: Fish often die because of the high concentrations of the toxin in the waters.
gn: Pirakuéra omano jepi oĩ hetaitereihaguére pe mba'e oporombohasýva ýpe.

en: Humans can be affected by breathing affected water taken into the air by wind and waves.
gn: Yvyporakuéra ikatu hasy ohetũrõ yvai yvytu ha y apeno omosarambíva pytúre.

en: At its peak, Tropical Cyclone Gonu, named for a bag of palm leaves in the language of the Maldives, reached sustained winds of 240 kilometers an hour (149 miles per hour) .
gn: Hatãveháme, Yvytuvai Yvyjopepygua Gonu, ojeheróva upéicha vosa oguerekóva pindo rogue rupi Maldivas ñe'ẽme, ohupyty yvytu ohóva 240 kilómetro aravóre (149 milla aravóre).

en: By early today, winds were around 83 km/h, and it was expect to keep weakening.
gn: Ko árape pyharevete, yvytu oho 83 kilómetro aravóre rupi ha oñeha'ãrõ ikãngyve ohóvo.

en: On Wednesday, the United States' National Basketball Association (NBA) suspended its professional basketball season due to concerns regarding COVID-19.
gn: Ararundýpe, Tetãgua Baloncesto Aty Estados Unidos-gua ojoko hi'arajere baloncesto mba'apokuaáva rehegua ojepy'apýre COVID-19 rehe.

en: The NBA's decision followed a Utah Jazz player testing positive for the COVID-19 virus.
gn: Tetãgua Baloncesto Aty he'i upéva peteĩ Utah Jazz ra'ãhára oguereko rire upe COVID-19 virus.

en: "Based on this fossil, that means the split is much earlier than has been anticipated by the molecular evidence.
gn: Ejehecha rire ko fósil, ojekuaa he’iseha pe división oikomahague ymaiterei evidencia molecular he’íva oikotaha mboyve.

en: That means everything has to be put back," said researcher at the Rift Valley Research Service in Ethiopia and a co-author of the study, Berhane Asfaw.
gn: “Upéva he’ise opa mba’e oñembojevy jey va’erãha”, he’i Rift Valley Research Service Etiopía-pegua jeporekahára ha tembiapo Berhane Asfaw apohára mokõiha.

en: Until now, AOL has been able to move and develop the IM market at its own pace, due to its widespread use within the United States.
gn: Ko’ágã peve, AOL ikatu omongu’e ha omboheko mensajería instantánea mercado ha’e oipotahaichaite, tuichaháicha ojeiporu rupi Estados Unidos-pe.

en: With this arrangement in place, this freedom might end.
gn: Ko oñemohendáva hendaguépe, ko sãso ikatu opa hína.

en: The number of users of the Yahoo! and Microsoft services combined will rival the number of AOL's customers.
gn: Yahoo! Ha Microsoft poruhára retakue ojoajúrõ oha’ãkuaáta AOL cliente-kuéra retakue.

en: The Northern Rock bank had been nationalised in 2008 following the revelation that the company had received emergency support from the UK Government.
gn: Banco Northern Rock ohasa kuri tetã rekuái poguýpe 2008-pe ojeikuaa rire upe empresa-pe oguahẽhague pytyvõ pya’erãra Reino Unido retãgui.

en: Northern Rock had required support due to its exposure during the subprime mortgage crisis in 2007.
gn: Northern Rock ojerure kuri ñepytyvõ oñe’ẽvo crisis de las hipotecas de alto riesgo aja 2007 arýpe.

en: Sir Richard Branson's Virgin Group had a bid for the bank rejected prior to the bank’s nationalisation.
gn: Virgin Group Sir Rochard Branson mba’évape oñeikuave’ẽ kuri pe banco ha oñembotove ohasa mboyve tetã rekuái poguýpe.

en: In 2010, while nationalised, the current high street bank Northern Rock plc was split from the ‘bad bank’, Northern Rock (Asset Management).
gn: 2012 arýpe, oĩmavo tetã rekuái poguýpe, banco principal Northern Rock plc ojei “banco vai” Northern Rock-gui  (Asset Management).

en: Virgin have only purchased the ‘good bank’ of Northern Rock, not the asset management company.
gn: Virgin ojogua pe Northern Rock “banco porã” añónte, ha ndojoguáipeempresa orekóva gestión activa.

en: This is believed to be the fifth time in history that people have observed what turned out to be chemically confirmed martian material falling to Earth.
gn: Ojeguerovia ko’ág̃a pohajey hína yvy ape rembiasápe tapichakuéra ojuhuha ko ha’éva peteĩ mba’e oúva marte-gui  ho’áva yvy apeári químicamente oñemboajéva.

en: Out of the approximately 24,000 known meteorites to have fallen to Earth, only about 34 have been verified to be martian in origin.
gn: Umi 24.000 meteorito ojeikuaáva ho’ahague yvy ape ári apytépe, 34 añónte ojejuhu ouhague marte-gui.

en: Fifteen of these rocks are attributed to the meteorite shower last July.
gn: Papo ko’ã ita apytégui oje’e ouhague lluvia de metorito jasypokõi ohasa va’ekuére guare apytépe.

en: Some of the rocks, which are very rare on Earth, are being sold from US$11,000 to $22,500 per ounce, which is about ten times more than the cost of gold.
gn: Oĩ umi ita apytépe, ndojekuaaguasúiva yvy ape ári, oñemoñemu 11.000 ha 22.500 dólares la onza,  upéva he’ise diez veces hepyveha órogui.

en: Following the race, Keselowski remains the Drivers' Championship leader with 2,250 points.
gn: Carrera rire, Keselowski hína oĩ gueteri tenondete Campeonato de Pilotos-pe 2.250 puntos reheve.

en: Seven points behind, Johnson is second with 2,243.
gn: Siete punto hapykuévo, oĩ Johnson mokõihápe 2.243 reheve.

en: In third, Hamlin is twenty points behind, but five ahead of Bowyer. Kahne and Truex, Jr. are fifth and sixth respectively with 2,220 and 2,207 points.

gn: Pa ary rire, omoakã kuri sovietico-kuéra vore Apolo-Soyuz rembiapópe oikuaaukáva carrera espacial opámaha.

en: She said, "There is no intelligence to suggest that an attack is expected imminently.
gn: Ha'e he´i kuri: "Ndaipóri inteligencia he´íva oñeha´ãrõha peteĩ ataque oikótava.

en: However, the reduction of the threat level to severe does not mean the overall threat has gone away."
gn: Katu, upe amenaza nivel ñembosa'ive, nde'iséi upe amenaza guasu opamaha.

en: While authorities are unsure of the credibility of the threat, the Maryland Transportaion Authority made the closure with the urging of the FBI.
gn: Jepéramo moakãharakuéra ndogueroviapái amenaza, Maryland Transporte moakãhára omboty kuri FBI jeykekópe.

en: Dump trucks were used to block tube entrances and assistance of 80 police were on hand to direct motorists to detours.
gn: Ojeiporu kuri volteo camión-kuéra ohapembopy haguã tubo-kuéra jeikeha ha 80 policía oĩ kuri ombohape haguã umi mba'yrumýi omboguatávape desvio-kuéra rehe.

en: There were no heavy traffic delays reported on the beltway, the city's alternate route.
gn: Ndojeikuaaukái kuri jeiko mbegueve tráfico ipohýiva circunvalación-pe, ambue tape táva oguerekóva.

en: Nigeria previously announced it planned to join the AfCFTA in the week leading up to the summit.
gn: Nigeria he'i kuri oñembosako'ihague oike haguã AfCFTA-pe arapokõindy cumbre oñepyrũ mboyvévape.

en: AU trade and industry commissioner Albert Muchanga announced Benin was to join.
gn: Ñemureko ha aporeko comisionado UA-pegua Albert Muchanga he'i kuri Benin oiketaha.

en: The commissioner said, "We haven't yet agreed on rules of origin and tariff con[c]essions, but the framework we have is enough to start trading on July 1, 2020".
gn: Comisionado he'i kuri: "Ne´irã romoneĩ mba'éichatapa ñepyrũgua ha arancel oñeme'ẽtava mbojojaha, katu marco oĩmbáma romba'apo ñepyrũ haguã 1 jasypokõi 2020-pe.

en: The station maintained its attitude, despite the loss of a gyroscope earlier in the space station mission, until the end of the spacewalk.
gn: Estación opyta kuri peteĩ ñe'ẽme, jepéramo oho kuri chugui peteĩ giroscopio peteĩ tembiapo estación espacial-pe, caminata espacial opa peve.

en: Chiao and Sharipov reported being a safe distance from the attitude adjustment thrusters.
gn: Chiao ha Sharipov omomarandu kuri oĩha mombyry ha ñeñangarekópe propulsor mohendahágui.

en: Russian ground control activated the jets and normal attitude of the station was regained.
gn: Yvypegua sãmbyhyhára Rusia-gua omyandy kuri avión-kuéra ha oñemohenda porã jey Estación.

en: The case was prosecuted in Virginia because it is the home to the leading internet service provider AOL, the company who instigated the charges.
gn: Upe ojehúva oñembohasa kuri Virginia-pe oĩhápe Internet kuave'ẽmby omotenodéva AOL, ko ñemuha ombohape kuri cargo-kuéra.

en: This is the first time a conviction has been gained using the legislation enacted in 2003 to curb bulk e-mail, aka spam, from unsolicited distribution into users mailboxes.
gn: Ko'ágã hína peteĩ ramo ojeguereko peteĩ condena ojeiporúvo mbojojaha oñeguenohẽ va'ekue 2003-pe ojehapejoko haguã corro masivo, ojeikuaáva ave spam-ramo, oñemoguahẽva poruharakuéra marandu guahẽhápe ojerure'ỹre.

en: 21-year-old Jesus joined Manchester City last year in January 2017 from Brazilian club Palmeiras for a reported fee of £27 million.
gn: Jesús, 21 ary oguerekóva, ojoaju kuri Manchester City-pe ary ohasa va'ekuépe 2017 jasyteĩramo club Brasil-gua Palmeiras-gui peteĩ tepy ojeikuaaukáva £ 27 millones rehe.

en: Since then, the Brazilian has featured in 53 matches for the club in all competitions and has scored 24 goals.
gn: Upe guive, ha'ãhára Brasil-gua oha'ã kuri 53 partido club ndive opaite ñoa'ãngatúpe ha omoinge 24 gol.

en: Dr. Lee also expressed his concern about reports that children in Turkey have now become infected with the A(H5N1) avian influenza virus without becoming ill.
gn: Dr. Lee he'i avei kuri oipy'apýva chupe marandu he'íva mitã Turquía-guápe ojapyhyhague influenza aviar-gui A (H5N1) hasy'ỹre.

en: Some studies suggest that the disease must become less lethal before it can cause a global epidemic, he noted.
gn: Ambue estudio he'i upe mba'asy sa'ive oporojukakuaa va'erãha oiko mboyve chugui peteĩ epidemia global, ohai kuri.

en: There is concern that patients may continue to infect more people by going through their daily routines if the flu symptoms remain mild.
gn: Oĩ hína peteĩ jepy'apy umi paciente ombohasakuaa gueteriha ambue tapichápe mba'asy oikokuévo upe rupi gripe sintoma-kuéra sa'íramo gueteri.

en: Leslie Aun, a spokesperson for the Komen Foundation, said the organization adopted a new rule that does not allow grants or funding to be awarded to organizations that are under legal investigation.
gn: Leslie Aun, Fundación Komen, he'i kuri organización oguerekoha peteĩ mbojojaha ipyahúva ombotovéva umi organización-pe toñeme'ẽ chupekuéra subvención térã fondo oĩ rupi investigación legal guýpe.

en: Komen's policy disqualified Planned Parenthood due to a pending investigation on how Planned Parenthood spends and reports its money that is being conducted by Representative Cliff Stearns.
gn: Komen política ojapo peteĩ descalificación Planned Parenthood-pe peteĩ jeporeka oĩva gueteri oikuaa haguã mba'éichapa Planned Parenthood oiporu ha omomarandu iviru omoakãva Cliff Stearns motenondehára.

en: Stearns is investigating whether taxes are used to fund abortions through Planned Parenthood in his role as chairman of the Oversight and Investigations Subcommittee, which is under the umbrella of the House Energy and Commerce Committee.
gn: Stearn ohapykuereka hína impuesto ojeiporúva ojehepyme'ẽ haguã aborto-kuéra Planned Parenthood rupive, Investigación ha Supervisón Subcomité mburuvicháramo, oĩva Energía ha Ñemureko Representante-kuéra Cámara po guýpe.

en: Former Massachusetts governor Mitt Romney won the Florida Republican Party presidential primary election on Tuesday with over 46 percent of the vote.
gn: Massachusetts gobernador-kue Mitt Rommey ha'eve kuri mburuvicha jeiporavo peteĩhápe Florida-pegua Partido Republicano-pegua araapýramo ha oguereko kuri 46% oiporavóva chupe.

en: Former U.S. Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich came in second with 32 percent.
gn: Representante-kuéra Cámara Estados Unidos-gua, Newt Gingrich, opyta kuri tenda mokõihápe 32% oiporavóva chupe.

en: As a winner-takes-all state, Florida awarded all fifty of its delegates to Romney, pushing him ahead as the front-runner for the Republican Party nomination.
gn: Pe Estado ha'evéva oguerapaitehápe, Florida ome'ẽ kuri 50 delegado Romney-pe, upeicha rupi itendonde favorito-ramo ojehero haguã Partido Republicano-pe.

en: Organisers of the protest said about 100,000 people turned up in German cities such as Berlin, Cologne, Hamburg, and Hanover.
gn: Protesta mbosako'iharakuéra he'i kuri 100.000 tapicha osẽhague manifestación-pe Alemania tavakuérape, Berlín, Colonia, Hamburgo ha Hannover-pe.

en: In Berlin, police estimated 6,500 protestors.
gn: Berlin pe, tahachi kuéra he'i oimene hague 6.500 manifestantes.

en: Protests also took place in Paris, Sofia in Bulgaria, Vilnius in Lithuania, Valetta in Malta, Tallinn in Estonia, and Edinburgh and Glasgow in Scotland.
gn: Paris pe avei oiko manifestacion, Sofia pe Bulgaria pe, Vilnius pe Lituania pe, Valeta pe Malta pe, Tallin pe Estonia pe, ha Edinburgo ha Glasgow pe Escocia pe.

en: In London, about 200 people protested outside some major copyright holders' offices.
gn: Londres pe, amo 200 avakuéra oprotesta umi oficina de propiedad intelectual tuichaveva kuéra renondepe.

en: Last month, there were major protests in Poland when that country signed ACTA, which has led to the Polish government deciding not to ratify the agreement, for now.
gn: Pe Jasy ohasa vaekue, oiko peteĩ protesta tuichava Polonia pe upe tetã ofirma kuri ACTA, ha pea ogueraha kuri pe gobierno polaco ani haguã oratifica ko acuerdo ko'agã.

en: Latvia and Slovakia have both delayed the process of joining ACTA.
gn: Latvia ha Eslovaquia mokõiveva omombegue hina pe proceso jeike haguã ACTApe.

en: Animal Liberation and the Royal Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals (RSPCA) are again calling for the mandatory installation of CCTV cameras in all Australian abattoirs.
gn: Mymba Ñemosãso ha Realeza Ñeñangareko ohapejoko haguã mymba jeguereko vai (RSPCA) ojerure jey CCTV cámara ñemoĩ mayma mymba jejukaha Australia-guápe.

en: RSPCA New South Wales chief inspector David O'Shannessy told the ABC that surveillance and inspections of abattoirs should be commonplace in Australia.
gn: RSPCA inspector mbohapehára Nueva Gales Sur-guáva, David O'Shannessy, he'i kuri ABC-pe ñeñangareko ha jesareko mymba jejukaha rehe ojejapo meme va'erãha Australia-pe.

en: "The CCTV would certainly send a strong signal to those people working with animals that their welfare is of the highest priority."
gn: CCVT añetehápe oikuaauka mbaretéta umi tapicha omba'apóva mbymba ndivepe ijeguerekoporã tuicha mba'eha.

en: The United States Geological Survey international earthquake map showed no earthquakes in Iceland in the week prior.
gn: Pe mapa Estudio Geologico Internaciona Estados Unidos rehegua ndohechaukái kuri ni peteî yvy ryryi oikova Islandia pe arapokõindy mboyve.

en: The Icelandic Meteorological Office also reported no earthquake activity in the Hekla area in the past 48 hours.
gn: Pe Oficina Meteorologica Islandia pegua omomarandu avei ndaipori hague yvy ryryi pe Hekla area pe umi 48 aravo ohava vaekue pe.

en: The significant earthquake activity resulting in the phase change had took place on March 10 on the northeast side of the volcano's summit caldera.
gn: Pe yvyryryi tuichava oiko vaekue pe cambio de fase oiko kuri Jasyapy 10 pe yvate kuarahy reikevo pe volcan apýra caldera gotyo.

en: Dark clouds unrelated to any volcanic activity were reported at the base of the mountain.
gn: Arai hûva ndoguerekóiva mba'eve actividad volcanica ojehecha kuri pe yvyty ape.

en: The clouds presented the potential for confusion as to whether an actual eruption had taken place.
gn: Umi arai kuéra ojepresenta kuri pe confusion raicha ndojeikuaai rupi oikopa ra'e pe erupcion.

en: The Luno had 120–160 cubic metres of fuel aboard when it broke down and high winds and waves pushed it into the breakwater.
gn: Luno oguereko kuri combustible 120 ha 160 metro cúbico rupi pype ha yvytu hatã ha ola-kuéra omyaña kuri rompeolas rehe.

en: Helicopters rescued the twelve crewmembers and the only injury was a broken nose.
gn: Helicóptero-kuéra oguenohẽ kuri umi pakõi truipulante-pe ha ñehunga vai oiko va'ekue peteĩ tĩ jeka.

en: The 100-metre ship was en route to pick up its usual fertiliser cargo and initially officials feared the vessel could spill a load.
gn: Barco oguerekóva 100 metro oho kuri ogueru fertilizante carga jepiverõguáicha ha ñepyrũrã funcionario-kuéa okyhyje kuri buque oñohẽ mba'éramo peteĩ carga.

en: The proposed amendment already passed both houses in 2011.
gn: Enmienda oje'éva omboajéma kuri mokõive cámara 2011-pe.

en: A change was made this legislative session when the second sentence was deleted first by the House of Representatives and then was passed in a similar form by the Senate Monday.
gn: Oñemoambue kuri ko sesión legislativa ñe'ẽsyry mokõiha oñembogue kuri ñepyrũrã Representante Cámara ha upéi oñemboaje kuri upeichagua Senado-pe arakõime.

en: The failure of the second sentence, which proposes to ban same-sex civil unions, could possibly open the door for civil unions in the future.
gn: Ñe'ẽsyry mokõiha fracaso, he'íva ombotoveha tapicha imeña ojoeheguáva omenda haguã oñondive ágã tenonderãve.

en: Following the process, HJR-3 will be reviewed again by the next elected legislature in either 2015 or 2016 to remain in process.
gn: Ojehapykuehóvo proceso, HJR-3 ojehecha jeýta ágã lesgislatura upeiguávape 2015 térã 2016-pe oĩ gueteri haguã tembiapo ryepýpe.

en: Vautier's achievements outside of directing include a hunger strike in 1973 against what he viewed as political censorship.
gn: Vautier ohupytýva moakãha okahápe oike peteĩ huelga vare'a rehegua 1973-pe ha'eohecháva censura política-ramo.

en: French law was changed. His activism went back to age 15 when he joined the French Resistance during World War II.
gn: Francia-gua léi oñemoambue kuri. Activismo hesegua oñepyrũ kuri ojapo 15 ary ojoajúramo Francia-gua resistencia-pe Segunda Guerra Mundial aja.

en: He documented himself in a 1998 book.
gn: Oñembokuati ijupe peteĩ arandukápe 1998-pe.

en: In the 1960s he headed back to newly-independent Algeria to teach film directing.
gn: Arykuéra 1990 aja ou jey tetã isãso ramóva Argelia ombo'e hag̃ua cine ñemoakã.

en: Japanese judoka Hitoshi Saito, winner of two Olympic gold medals, has died at the age of 54.
gn: Judoca Japón-gua Hitoshi Saito, ha'eve va'ekue oguereko haguã mokõi medalla olimpica itajúgui ojejapóva, omano kuri ombotývo 54 ary.

en: The cause of death was announced as intrahepatic bile duct cancer.
gn: Oje'e kuri omanohague cáncer vías biliar intrahepática-kuégui.

en: He died in Osaka on Tuesday.
gn: Omano kuri Osaka-pe araapýramo

en: As well as a former Olympic and World champion, Saito was the All Japan Judo Federation training committee chairman at the time of his death.
gn: Avei olimpiada campeón-kue ha arapýpe ha'evéva, Saito Judo jejapo Japón-gua Aty Mburuvicha kuri upe omanoramoguare.

en: At least 100 people had attended the party, in order to celebrate the first anniversary of a couple whose wedding was held last year.
gn: 100 tapicha rupi oho kuri vy'ahápe, oguerovy'a haguã aniversario peteĩha mokõi tapicha omenda va'ekue ary ohasa va'ekuépe.

en: A formal anniversary event was scheduled for a later date, officials said.
gn: Peteĩ aniversario oiko va'ekue oñembosako'i va'ekue peteĩ arange upe rire guarã, he'i kuri moakãharakuéra.

en: The couple had married in Texas one year ago and came to Buffalo to celebrate with friends and relatives.
gn: Upe pareja omenda kuri Texas-pe ojapo peteĩ ary ha ou Buffalo-pe oguerovy'a haguã iñangirũ ha hogayguakuéra ndive.

en: The 30-year-old husband, who was born in Buffalo, was one of the four killed in the shooting, but his wife was not hurt.
gn: Ména oguerekóva 30 ary, heñói va'ekue Buffalo-pe, oĩ umi irundy omanóva apytépe upe jejapípe, katu hembirekópe ndojehúi mba'eve.

en: Karno is a well-known but controversial English tutor who taught under Modern Education and King's Glory who claimed to have 9,000 students at the peak of his career.
gn: Karno hína peteĩ tutor Inglaterra-gua oñembohovakéva ombo'e va'ekue Jehekombo'e ha Rey de Gloria-pe, ha omboaje kuri 9000 temimbo'e oĩha yvatete hembiapohápe.

en: In his notes he used words which some parents considered coarse, and he reportedly used profanity in class.
gn: Jehaipýpe oiporu kuri ñe'ẽ ambue tuvakuéra oguerohory'ỹva ha oñemomarandu kuri avei oiporuha blasfemia mbo'esyrýpe.

en: Modern Education accused him of printing large advertisements on buses without authorisation and lying by saying that he was the chief English tutor.
gn: Modern Jehekombo'e omboja kuri hese omoĩhague ñekuave'ẽ tuicháva mba'yrumýi rehe oñemboaje'ỹre chupe, he'ívo ha'eha tutor ha'evéva Inglés-pegua.

en: He has also been accused previously of copyright infringement, but was not charged.
gn: Oñemboja avei hese opyrũ hague apohára derecho rehe, katu noemoneĩri kuri.

en: A former student said that he 'used slang in class, taught dating skills in notes, and was just like the students' friend.'
gn: Peteĩ hemimbo'ekue he'i kuri "oiporuha jerga mbo'esyrýpe, ombo'e imandu'a haguã ojehaíva rehe ha oñemoangirũ tembimbo'ekuéra ndive"

en: During the last three decades, despite officially remaining a communist state, China has developed a market economy.
gn: Mbohapy década ohasa va'ekuépe, jepéramo peteĩ Estado comunista gueteri, China oguerojera peteĩ ñemureko mercado ryepýpe.

en: The first economic reforms were made under the leadership of Deng Xiaoping.
gn: Umi ñemureko oñemoambue oñepyrũ va'ekue Deng Xiaoping poguýpe.

en: Since then, China's economic size has grown by 90 times.
gn: Upe guive, China ñemureko okakuaa kuri 90 jey jey.

en: For the first time, last year China exported more cars than Germany and surpassed the United States as the biggest market for this industry.
gn: Peteĩ jey, ary ohasa va'ekuépe China ojapo mba'yrumýi expotación hetave Alemani-gui, ohasa Estados Unidos-pe ñemuha tuichavévape ko mba'épe guarãme.

en: China's GDP could be larger than the United States within two decades.
gn: China PIB ikatu hína tuichave Estados Unidos mba'évagui mokõi década-pe.

en: Tropical Storm Danielle, fourth named storm of the 2010 Atlantic hurricane season, has formed in the eastern Atlantic Ocean.
gn: Arapochy tropical Danielle, arapochy irundyha hérava ko huracán oikoha tiempo Atlantico-pe 2010-ramo,oñepyrũ kuri Oceano Atlántico este gotyo.

en: The storm, located approximately 3,000 miles from Miami, Florida, has maximum sustained winds of 40 mph (64 kph).
gn: Upe tormenta, opytáva 3000 milla rupi Miami, Florida-gui, oguereko yvytu ohupytýva 40 mph (64 kph).

en: Scientists at the National Hurricane Center predict that Danielle will strengthen to a hurricane by Wednesday.
gn: Kuaaharakuéra Arapochy Renda Tetãgua he'i Danielle imbaretetaha huracán-pe ágã ararundýpe.

en: As the storm is far from landfall, it remains difficult to assess potential impact to the United States or Caribbean.
gn: Arapochy oĩ rupi mombyry gueteri yvýgui, hasy gueteri ojeikuaa haguã mba'éichapa opokóta Estados Unidos ha Caribe rehe.

en: Born in the Croatian capital, Zagreb, Bobek gained fame while playing for Partizan Belgrade.
gn: Heñói kuri peteĩ hospital Croacia-guápe, Sagreb, Bobek, ojeikuaaite kuri oha'ãramo guare Pertizan-pe guarã belgrado-pe.

en: He joined them in 1945 and stayed until 1958.
gn: Ojoaju hesekuéra 1945-pe ha oi upépe 1958 peve.

en: During his time with the team, he scored 403 goals in 468 appearances.
gn: Oĩ aja upépe, omoinge 403 gol ha oha'ã 468 partido.

en: No one else has ever made more appearances or scored more goals for the club than Bobek.
gn: Ndaipóri avave oha'ãve va'ekue chugu térã omoingeve va'ekue gol upe club-pe guarã Bovek-gui.

en: In 1995 he was voted the best player in Partizan's history.
gn: 1995-pe ojeiporavo kuri chupe ha'ãhára ha'evéva Partizan-pe.

en: The celebrations started with a special show by the world-renowned group Cirque du Soleil.
gn: Jeguerovy'a oñepyrũ kuri peteĩ espectaculo especial-va ojapóva aty ojekuaáva opa hendápe Cirque du Soleil.

en: It was followed by the Istanbul State Symphony Orchestra, a Janissary band, and the singers Fatih Erkoç and Müslüm Gürses.
gn: Ohapykueho kuri chupe Orquesta Sinfónica Estatal- Estambul-gua, peteĩ banda jenízara, ha puraheihára Fatih Erkoç ha Müslüm Gürses.

en: Then Whirling Dervishes took to the stage.
gn: H-a upépe umi deviche jere ojupi escenario-pe.

en: Turkish diva Sezen Aksu performed with the Italian tenor Alessandro Safina and Greek singer Haris Alexiou.
gn: Diva Tuquía-gua omoha'ãnga kuri tenor italiagua Alessandro Safina ha puraheihára Grecia-gua Haris Alexiou.

en: To finish, Turkish dance group Fire of Anatolia performed the show "Troy".
gn: Oñemohu'ã haguã, jerokyhára aty Turquía-gua, Anatolia omoteneonde kuri ´petes Troya rehegua espectáculo.

en: Peter Lenz, a 13-year-old motorcycle racer, has died after being involved in a crash at the Indianapolis Motor Speedway.
gn: Peters Lenz, peteĩ motocicleta piloto orekóva 13 ary, omano kuri oĩ rire peteĩ accidente oiko va'ekue Indianapolis Motor Speedway-pe.

en: While on his warm-up lap, Lenz fell off his bike, and was then struck by fellow racer Xavier Zayat.
gn: Ojere ñepyrũ aja calentamiento-pe, Lenz ho'a bicicleta-gui ha upéi ombeti hese iñirũ ñañanihapegua Xavier Zayat.

en: He was immediately attended to by the on-track medical staff and transported to a local hospital where he later died.
gn: Pya'ete oñeñangareko kuri hese personal médico pista-pe oĩva rehe ha ojegueraha chupe tasyópe upe rire omanohaguépe.

en: Zayat was unhurt in the accident.
gn: Zayat-pe ndojehúi mba'evete accidente-pe.

en: Regarding the global financial situation, Zapatero continued by saying that "the financial system is a part of the economy, a crucial part.
gn: Ñemureko situación global rehegua, Zapatero he'i kuri, ñemureko sistema ha'eha peteĩ economía pehẽngue tuicha mba'etereíva.

en: We have a year-long financial crisis, which has had its most acute moment in the past two months, and I think now the financial markets are beginning to recover."
gn: Roguereko peteĩ crisis financiera ipukúva peteĩ ary, ohasa va'ekue upe ivaivéva umi mokõi jasy ohasa va'ekuépe, ha vaicha umi ñemureko mercado oñakãrapu'ã jey ohóvo.

en: Last week, Naked News announced that it would dramatically increase its international language mandate to news reporting, with three new broadcasts.
gn: Arapokõindy ohasava'ekuépe,Naked News oikuaauka omombaretevétaha ipokatu ñe'ẽ ára yvy'ape'ári omog̃uahẽ hag̃uã marandukuéra, mbohapy transmisión pyahu reheve.

en: Already reporting in English and Japanese, the global organization is launching Spanish, Italian, and Korean-language programs, for television, the web, and mobile devices.
gn: Yvy'ape'áripegua atyguasu, oporomarandúmava inglés ha japonés-pe, omyasãima apopyrã español, italiano ha coreano ta'ãngambyry, internet ha tembiporumỹime g̃uarã.

en: "Luckily nothing happened to me, but I saw a macabre scene, as people tried to break windows in order to get out.
gn: Ha’etépe katu ndojehúi cheve nba’eve, hakatu ahecha heta mba’e vai, tapichakuéra ojokaséramo ovetã osẽ hagHa’etépe katu ndojehúi cheve nba’eve, hakatu ahecha heta mba’e vai, tapichakuéra ojokaséramo ovetã osẽ hag̃ua.

en: People were hitting the panes with chairs, but the windows were unbreakable.
gn: Tapichakuéra ombota apykápe umi vidrio, hakatu ko’ãva ojeka’ỹva ra’e.

en: One of the panes finally broke, and they started to get out by the window," said survivor Franciszek Kowal.
gn: “Hasypeve, peteĩ vidrio ojeka ha osẽjoa tapichakuéra ovetã rupi”, he’i Franciszek Kowal, tapicha oikovéva.

en: Stars give off light and heat because of the energy made when hydrogen atoms are merged (or fused) together to form heavier elements.
gn: Mbyjakuéra omimbi ha haku upe energía opoíva rupi, umi átomo hidrogeno ojoaju rupi omoheñói hagMbyjakuéra omimbi ha haku upe energía opoíva rupi, umi átomo hidrogeno ojoaju rupi omoheñói hag̃ua elemento ipohyivéva.

en: Scientists are working to create a reactor that can make energy in the same way.
gn: Umi tembikuaahára omba’apo hína omoheñói hag̃ua peteĩ reactor ikatúva ojapo energía upeichaguaiténte avei.

en: This, however, is a very hard problem to solve and will take many years before we see useful fusion reactors built.
gn: Hakatu, kóva ha’e peteĩ apañuãi hasyetereíva iñemyatyrõ ha ohasáta heta ary gueteri jahechamboyve ojejapóramo peteĩ fusión rehegua reactor ojeporukuaáva hekopete.

en: The steel needle floats on top of the water because of surface tension.
gn: Acero-guigua ju ovevúi y’ári tensión superficial rupive.

en: Surface tension happens because the water molecules at the surface of the water are strongly attracted to each other more than they are to the air molecules above them.
gn: Tensión superficial oiko umi y regua molécula y’áripegua ojoheka mbarete rupi hikuái, hetave umi yvytu molécula hi’ariguápe.

en: The water molecules make an invisible skin on the water’s surface that allows things like the needle to float on top of the water.
gn: Y molécula ojapo peteĩ pire ojekuaa’ỹva y’ári ha upéva rupi ju ovevúi y’ári.

en: The blade on a modern ice skate has a double edge with a concave hollow between them. The two edges allow for a better grasp of the ice, even when tilted.
gn: Peteĩ yrypy’apegua patín ko’ag̃aguáva oguereko peteĩ ikuaha ojoapytépe. Upéicha rupi mokõive hembe’y ojaporãve yrypy’a rehe, jepéramo oĩ karẽ.

en: Because the bottom of the blade is slightly curved, as the blade tilts to one side or the other, the edge which is in contact with the ice also curves.
gn: Upe cuchilla yvypegua ikarẽ rupi michĩmĩ, upe cuchilla ikarẽ’imívo peteĩ térã ambue tenda gotyo, upe hembe’y ojáva yrypyy’áre ikarẽ’imi avei.

en: This causes the skater to turn. If the skates tilt to the right, the skater turns right, if the skates tilt to the left, the skater turns left.
gn: Kóicha rupi patinador ikatu ojere. Upe patín ikarẽramo akatúa gotyo, patinador ojere akatúa gotyo, patín ikarẽramo asu gotyo, patinador ojere ijasu gotyo.

en: To return to their previous energy level, they must get rid of the extra energy they got from the light.
gn: Eho jey hag̃uã energía ojeguereko va’ekuépe, oñemboyke raẽ va’erã energía extra oñeguenohẽ va’ekue luzgui.

en: They do this by emitting a tiny particle of light called a "photon".
gn: Ojejapo oñeme’ẽnguévo michĩmi luz partícula hérava “fotón”.

en: Scientists call this process "stimulated emission of radiation" because the atoms are stimulated by the bright light, causing the emission of a photon of light, and light is a type of radiation.
gn: Tembikuaarekahára ohenói ko tembiapópe “radiación ñeme’ẽ” umi átomo oñemomỹi rupi luz mimbi rupive, ha omoheñói peteĩ luz fotón rehegua, ha upe luz ha’e peteĩ radiación.

en: The next picture shows the atoms emitting photons. Of course, in reality photons are a lot smaller than those in the picture.
gn: Ambue ta’ãnga ohechauka átomo-kuéra ome’ẽnguévo fotón-kuéra. Añetehápe umi fotón michĩeteve ko ta’ãngapeguápe.

en: Photons are even smaller than the stuff that makes up atoms!
gn: Fotón-kuéra katu michĩve jey umi materia omoñepyrũva átomo-gui!

en: After hundreds of hours of operation the filament in the bulb eventually burns out and the light bulb no longer works.
gn: Hetaiterei aravo oiko rire, upe foco filamento okái ha ndoikovéi

en: The light bulb then needs replacing. It is necessary to be careful in replacing the light bulb.
gn: Ko’agKo’ag̃a katu, emoambueva’erã upe foco. Eñangarekova’erã foco emoambue aja.

en: First, the switch for the light fixture needs to be turned off or the cable disconnected.
gn: Ñepyrũrã, embogue ra’ẽva’erã foco rehegua llave térã emboguete

en: This is because electricity flowing into the socket where the metallic part of bulb sits can give you a severe electric shock if you touch the inside of the socket or the metal base of the bulb while it is still partly in the socket.
gn: Kóva oiko upe electricidad oĩva casquillo gotyo oĩháme foco metal uguerekóva ikatu ojapo peteĩ descarga ivaíva ojepokóramo casquillo ryepýpe terã base metálica, oĩ’aja gueteri casquillo-pe.

en: The major organ of the circulatory system is the heart, which pumps the blood.
gn: Upe órgano ha’evéva retepy jeikoparãverã  ha’e hína korasõ , omomỹi katui tuguýpe.

en: Blood goes away from the heart in tubes called arteries and comes back to the heart in tubes called veins. The smallest tubes are called capillaries.
gn: Tuguy osẽ korasõgui peteĩ tuguy rapére hérava arteria ha ohojey korasõ me ambue ruguy rape hérava vena-kuéra rupive. Umi tuguy rape michĩvéva hérava capilares.

en: A triceratops' teeth would have been able to crush not only leaves but even very tough branches and roots.
gn: Triceratops raĩnguéra ikaturaka’e ombochipe ndaha’éi togue año, avei hakã ha yvyra rapo hatãvéve.

en: Some scientists think Triceratops ate cycads, which are a type of plant that was common in the Cretaceous.
gn: Oĩ tembikuaahára oimo’ãva Triceratops ho’uha cícadas, ha’éva yvyramáta oĩvavoi Cretásico ryepýpe.

en: These plants look like a small palm tree with a crown of sharp, spiky leaves.
gn: Ko yvyramáta ha’ete peteĩ palmera michĩva oguerekóva hogue akua ha haimbéva.

en: A Triceratops could have used its strong beak to strip off the leaves before eating the trunk.
gn: Peteĩ Triceratops ikatu raka'e oipuru pico oguerekóva oipo'o hag̃ua hoguekue ho'umboyve hakãngue.

en: Other scientists argue that these plants are very poisonous so it is unlikely that any dinosaur ate them, even though today the sloth and other animals like the parrot (a descendant of the dinosaurs) can eat poisonous leaves or fruit.
gn: Oĩ avei tembikuaahára he’íva ko’ã yvyramáta oguerekoha veneno ha upéva rupi ndaipóri dinosaurio ho’uva’erã, hakatu ambue ko’agã rupi perezoso ha ambue mymba gua’áichagua ( dinosaurio descendiente) ikatu ho’u yvyramáta rogué térã yva oguerekóva veneno.

en: How would Io's gravity pull on me? If you stood on the surface of Io, you would weigh less than you do on Earth.
gn: Mba’éichapa eguerohorýta ra’e Io gravedad? Eiméramo Io superficie-pe, ndevevuivéta yvypeguágui.

en: A person who weighs 200 pounds (90kg) on Earth would weigh about 36 pounds (16kg) on Io. So the gravity, of course, pulls less on you.
gn: Peteĩ tapicha oguerkóva 90 kg yvy’ape’ári, oguerekóta 16 kg rupi Io-pe. Upéicharamo, gravedad, jaikuaaháicha, nembovevuive.

en: The Sun doesn't have a crust like the Earth that you can stand on. The whole Sun is made out of gases, fire, and plasma.
gn: Kuarahy ndoguerekói peteĩ ape ikatuhápe eñembo’y yvypeguáicha. Kuarahy tuichakue javeve ojejepo gas, tata ha plasma-gui.

en: The gas becomes thinner as you go farther from the center of the Sun.
gn: Gas ipo’ive ohóvo oñemomombyryvévo kuarahy mbytégui.

en: The outer-part we see when we look at the Sun is called the photosphere, which means "ball of light".
gn: Kuarahýre jahecháva ñamañávo hese héra fotosfera, he’iséva “Tata rendy apu’a”.

en: About three thousand years later, in 1610, Italian astronomer Galileo Galilei used a telescope to observe that Venus has phases, just as the moon does.
gn: Ojapo mbohapysu rire rupi, 1610-pe. Italia-pegua astrónomo Galileo Galilei oipuru peteĩ telescopio ohecha hag̃uã Venus oguerekoha fase, jasýicha avei.

en: Phases happen because only the side of Venus (or of the Moon) facing the Sun is lighted. The phases of Venus supported the theory of Copernicus that the planets go around the Sun.
gn: Umi fase-kuéra oiko ojehesape rupi Venus gotyo añónte (térã jasy) omañáva kuarahy gotyo. Umi Venus fase-kuéra oykeko Copérnico remimo’ã he’íva umi planeta-kuéra ojereha kuarahy rehe.

en: Then, a few years later in 1639, an English astronomer named Jeremiah Horrocks observed a transit of Venus.
gn: Upéi, heta ary ohasa rire, 1639-pe peteĩ astrónomo inglés hérava Jeremiah Horrocks, ohechakuaa peteĩ Venus rape."

en: England had experienced a long period of peace after the reconquest of the Danelaw.
gn: Inglaterra ohasa heta ára py'aguapýpe ojagarra rire pe Danelaw.

en: However in 991 Ethelred was faced with a Viking fleet larger than any since Guthrum's a century earlier.
gn: Ha 991 arýpe, Ethelred embohovake Vikingo kanoa aty ndive tuichaveva araka’eve ojehecha’ỹva Guthrum mba'éva oiko vaekue 100 ary mboyvégui.

en: This fleet was led by Olaf Trygvasson, a Norwegian with ambitions to reclaim his country from Danish domination.
gn: Upe yga'aty omotenondékuri Olaf Trygvasson, peteĩ Noruego oipotajeýva hetã umi Danés poguýgui.

en: After initial military setbacks, Ethelred was able to agree to terms with Olaf, who returned to Norway to try to gain his kingdom with mixed success.
gn: Osẽ vai ñepyrũvo imilitarkuéra, Ethelred oheka jeiko porã Olaf ndive, ha oho jevy Noruégape ojagarra haguã tetã ha ndaha'éi osẽ porãitéva.

en: Hangeul is the only purposely invented alphabet in popular daily use. The alphabet was invented in 1444 during the reign of King Sejong (1418 – 1450).
gn: Hangeul ha’e achegety oñemoheñóiva jeporu katuirã opavépe guarãva. Ko achegety oñemoheñói 1444-pe rey Sejong reinado jave (1418-1450).

en: King Sejong was the fourth king of the Joseon Dynasty and is one of the most highly regarded.
gn: Rey Sejong ha’e Kuri irundyha rey Joseon dinastía-pegua ha ha’e oñemomba’eguasuvéva.

en: He originally named the Hangeul alphabet Hunmin Jeongeum, which means "the correct sounds for the instruction of the people".
gn: Ñepyrũraite oñehenói achegety Hangeul Hunmin Jeongeum he’iséva “ Tyapu oĩporãva avakuéra ñemoarandurã”

en: There are many theories to how Sanskrit came into existence. One of them is about an Aryan migration from the west into India who brought their language with them.
gn: Oĩ heta teoría mba’éichapa heñói ra’e sánscrito. Peteĩva he’i oikohague peteĩ migració aria oeste guivo India gotyo ha ogueru iñe’ẽ hendivekuéra.

en: Sanskrit is an ancient language and is comparable to the Latin language spoken in Europe.
gn: Sánscrito ha’e peteĩ ñe’ẽ ymaguare ha oñembojoja latín reh oñeñe’ẽva Europa-pe.

en: The earliest known book in the world was written in Sanskrit. After the compilation of Upanishads, Sanskrit just faded due to hierarchy.
gn: Peteĩha aranduka ñepyrũ ojekuaáva yvy ape ári ojehaiva’ekue sánscrito-pe. Upéi Upanishads oñembyaty rire, sánscrito okañyrei jerarquía rupive.

en: Sanskrit is a very complex and rich language, which has served to be the source for many modern Indian languages, just like Latin is the source for European languages like French and Spanish.
gn: Sánscrito ha’e peteĩ ñe’ẽ oguerekopaitéva, ojeporúva heta indio moderno ñe’ẽ ñepyrurã, ha latín ha’eháicha avei, ha’e Europa-gua ñe’ẽnguéra taha’e francés térã español.

en: With the battle for France over, Germany began to get ready to invade the island of Britain.
gn: Opakuévo ñorãirõ Francia-rupive, Alemania oñepyrũ oñembosako’i oike hag̃ua mbaretépe Gran Bretaña-pe.

en: Germany code-named the attack “Operation Sealion”. Most of the British Army's heavy weapons and supplies had been lost when it evacuated from Dunkirk, so the army was fairly weak.
gn: Alemania ombohéra ijeroike "Operación Sealion". Opaite umi arma ipohýiva ha ñorãirõrã tembiporukuéra ejército británico mba’éva okañymba osẽnguévo hikuái Dunkerque-gui, upévagui ko ejército ikangyeterei.

en: But the Royal Navy was still much stronger than the German Navy (“Kriegsmarine”) and could have destroyed any invasion fleet sent across the English Channel.
